title: Truly Compatible
description: Allows certain ingots/materials from other mods to work as a modular material for Truly Modular.
body:
**This datapack adds compatibility to certain mods so their materials can work with [Truly Modular](https://modrinth.com/organization/truly-modular). _[ingots, bones, mob drops, you name it]_**

_Apothic Attributes is required for full compatibility!_

_LATEST VERSION OF MIAPI IS REQUIRED!_


## NOTE
**BE CAUTIOUS! I don't have enough time to create separates like "pickaxe" and "blades," therefore the balancing and stats implementation is extremely rushed/basic, so you may notice a lot of unbalanced stats. However, as this is open-source, feel free to adjust or balance the desired material, though ALMOST 67% of the time you might find a material in a mod that is compatible with Truly Modular.**

### List of supported mods:
- Alex's Caves
- Alex's Mobs
- Apocalypse Now
- Apotheosis
- AllTheOres
- Aquaculture 2
- Born In Chaos
- Cataclysm
- Crystalcraft Unlimited Edition
- Create
- Create Crafts & Additions
- End's Phantasm
- Farmer's Delight 
- Goety
- Illager Invasion
- Iron's Spellbooks
- Ice and Fire
- Legendary Monsters
- Legendary Creatures
- Minecraft Dungeons: Weapons
- Minecraft Dungeons: Armors
- Silent Compatibility
- Silent Gear
- Silent Gems
- Stalwart's Dungeons
- Terramity

- AND MANY MUCH MORE!!!!!!!
